Tech.sectionSubtitle: Why ALLPOWERS R2500 is the best choice for home

feature1.title: LiFePO4 battery
feature1.description: Won't burn, won't explode. Safe even when damaged. 3500+ cycles — over 10 years of daily use.

feature2.title: 2500W pure sine wave
feature2.description: 4000W peak handles startup currents from boilers, pumps and compressors. Safe for medical and sensitive electronics.

feature3.title: Fast charging up to 2000W
feature3.description: Dual input AC + Solar up to 2000W — full charge in 1 hour. Solar panels up to 1000W charge the station in 2 hours.

feature4.title: 15ms UPS
feature4.description: On grid loss the station instantly switches to battery in 15 milliseconds. Your computer won't shut down, the boiler keeps running, no data loss.

feature5.title: Expandable up to 3× B1000
feature5.description: Connect up to 3 additional B1000 batteries — up to 5000Wh total capacity for several days off-grid.

feature6.title: 4 charging modes
feature6.description: AC (wall outlet), Solar (panels), Auto (auto-switch) and Double (AC+Solar simultaneously). Maximum flexibility for any conditions.

feature7.title: Bluetooth / Wi-Fi control
feature7.description: Control the station via the ALLPOWERS mobile app: monitor charge, switch modes, get alerts. Bluetooth nearby or Wi-Fi from anywhere.

SeoText.title: 2500W Home Power Station: Reliable Energy in Any Conditions
SeoText.intro: With unstable power supply in Ukraine, a portable power station has become a necessity for apartments, private houses, offices and country homes. ChargeBase offers the modern ALLPOWERS R2500 portable power station — 2500W (4000W peak), 2016Wh capacity, lithium iron phosphate LiFePO4 battery with 3500+ charge cycles. 15ms UPS, four charging modes, expandable up to 3× B1000, Bluetooth and Wi-Fi remote control via the ALLPOWERS mobile app. We work from our Ukraine warehouse — Nova Poshta delivery in 1–2 days.
SeoText.feature1: Our stations are equipped with lithium iron phosphate batteries that withstand over 3,500 charge cycles. That is over 10 years of daily use — 5x longer than standard lithium-ion batteries.
SeoText.feature2: Critical for safe operation of gas boilers (Vaillant, Bosch, Baxi, Protherm), refrigerators, medical devices and sensitive electronics. The 4000W peak handles startup currents from pumps and compressors.
SeoText.feature3: Dual input AC + Solar up to 2000W — full charge in 1 hour. Solar panels supported up to 1000W with MPPT controller — full autonomy in 2 hours of sunlight.
SeoText.feature4: 15ms UPS — on grid loss your equipment stays on. Compatible with 3× B1000 expansion batteries — up to 5000Wh total capacity for long outages.
SeoText.useCasesTitle: Who Needs the 2500W ALLPOWERS R2500 LiFePO4 Power Station
SeoText.useCases: A universal solution for those looking for a quiet, safe alternative to a petrol generator. Suitable for owners of gas heating boilers with circulation pumps, apartment dwellers needing power for fridge, Wi-Fi router, TV and lighting during scheduled outages. Thanks to the 15ms UPS it's safe even for servers and medical devices. Compatible with solar panels up to 1000W. An alternative to EcoFlow Delta, Bluetti AC200P and Anker SOLIX F2000 at a much better price. In stock at our Ukraine warehouse with 1–2 day shipping.

Faq.sectionSubtitle: Answers to questions our customers ask most often

boiler.q: Can I connect a gas boiler to the power station?
boiler.a: Yes, our 2500W station with pure sine wave is compatible with all popular boilers — Vaillant, Bosch, Baxi, Protherm, Immergas. The circulation pump and boiler electronics consume around 100–150W, so a single 2016Wh charge will last 10–12 hours of continuous heating.

fridge.q: How many hours can the power station run a fridge?
fridge.a: An average household refrigerator consumes about 100–120W (factoring compressor cycles). On our 2016Wh station it will run for around 15–20 hours. Energy-efficient A++ models — up to 24 hours.

ups.q: What is 15ms UPS and why does it matter?
ups.a: When grid power fails (outage, accident) the station instantly switches to battery operation in 15 milliseconds. This is faster than sensitive equipment can detect: your computer won't reboot, no data loss, the heating boiler keeps running. Standard UPS units have 8–20ms switch-over time — our station matches professional UPS-grade performance.

expansion.q: Can I increase the station's capacity?
expansion.a: Yes, you can connect up to 3 additional B1000 batteries (1000Wh each) to the station. This raises total capacity to 5000Wh — enough to run a fridge for about 2 days or a heating boiler for a full day. B1000 expansion batteries are sold separately.

delivery.q: How fast does the order arrive?
delivery.a: We ship orders from our Ukraine warehouse via Nova Poshta. If you place the order before 14:00 we ship the same day, otherwise the next business day. Delivery typically takes 1–2 days. Tracking number is sent immediately after dispatch.

package.a: ALLPOWERS R2500 power station (2500W, 2016Wh), AC charging cable, manual in Ukrainian. Car charging cable and solar panel are sold separately. When ordering the 'station + solar panel' bundle, the solar panel cable is included.

damaged.q: What if the station arrives damaged?
damaged.a: Do not accept the parcel without inspection. Unpack it right at the Nova Poshta branch in the presence of an employee and file a damage report. We guarantee a full refund or product replacement within 14 days.

solar.q: Can I charge the station from solar panels?
solar.a: Yes, the station has an MPPT controller and supports charging from solar panels up to 1000W. Full charge in 2 hours of clear weather — complete energy independence without a wall outlet.

app.q: Is there a mobile app for remote control?
app.a: Yes. The ALLPOWERS R2500 supports control via Bluetooth (nearby) and Wi-Fi (from anywhere) through the official ALLPOWERS app (App Store and Google Play). The app shows battery level, real-time output/input power, lets you switch charging modes and sends critical alerts.

warranty.q: What is the warranty period for the power station?
warranty.a: The official manufacturer warranty is 12 months. The LiFePO4 battery is rated for over 3,500 charge cycles — 10+ years of daily use while retaining 80% of original capacity.
